channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Simon Willison] How I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
item.description: How I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets

item.title: [Hacker News] The Three-Second Theft: Why AI Voice Fraud Outruns Every Defence
item.description: The Three-Second Theft: Why AI Voice Fraud Outruns Every Defence

item.title: [OpenAI] The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
item.description: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action

item.title: [GitHub Trending] openinterpreter/openinterpreter — A coding agent for low-cost models
item.description: OpenInterpreter is a coding agent designed to work efficiently with low-cost language models.

item.title: [OpenAI] GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
item.description: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness

item.title: [Hacker News] I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
item.description: I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Scaling Point-in-Time Language Models
item.description: Point-in-time language models trained on chronologically filtered text eliminate lookahead bias for backtesting and causal inference in finance and social sciences.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CANDI: Contextual Alignment for Niche Domains Question Answering
item.description: Researchers introduce CANDI-QA, a benchmark dataset for evaluating language models' ability to answer context-sensitive questions in specialized domains like medicine and finance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] G-SHARE: A Guideline-Based Structured Reasoning Framework for Human-Factor Event Diagnosis
item.description: G-SHARE framework uses structured reasoning to diagnose human-factor events in nuclear power plants with higher accuracy than baseline methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] I'm Sorry, but I Can't Help with Braille: Revealing Accessibility Failures in State-of-the-Art LLMs
item.description: State-of-the-art LLMs perform poorly on Korean-Braille translation due to inadequate tokenization; fine-tuning T5-small yields strong results.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Graph-Based Detection of Disinformation Narrative Diffusion between Russian and Ukrainian Telegram Channels
item.description: Researchers propose a graph-based framework using weak supervision to detect disinformation narrative diffusion across Telegram channels through network structure analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TAKE: Trajectory-Aware Knowledge Estimation for Text Dataset Distillation
item.description: TAKE framework distills text datasets to 0.1% size using trajectory-aware influence functions while maintaining downstream task performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Transforming LLMs into Efficient Cross-Encoders via Knowledge Distillation for RAG Reranking
item.description: LLaMA 3 fine-tuned as a reranker via LoRA and quantization achieves 14-21% performance gains over cross-encoders with lower inference costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MAGE: Understanding Stability-Performance Trade-offs in Multi-component Prompt Optimization
item.description: Study identifies Prompt Optimization Coupling Effect: combining multiple optimization signals simultaneously improves performance and increases variance in ways individual components cannot predict.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Belief-reality separation lives in routing over a shared value slot in language models
item.description: Researchers identify that language models separate character beliefs from reality through routing mechanisms over shared value slots in computation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hybrid Continual Learning for Low-Resource Australian Aboriginal Language Identification
item.description: Researchers develop continual learning methods to adapt speech models for low-resource Australian Aboriginal language identification without catastrophic forgetting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluating Nonuniform Dependability Across Response Conditions: A Conditional Generalizability Framework Illustrated in Automated Essay Scoring
item.description: Automated essay scoring dependability varies by response entropy strata, not uniformly across writing complexity levels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Agentic systems for breast cancer treatment recommendations
item.description: Agentic LLM systems evaluated on 72 breast cancer cases achieved 0.594 accuracy but exhibited persistent clinical failures including incorrect recommendations and citation errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Parallel Tracking: Interactive Multi-Feature Fusion Drives Semantic Reconstruction from Non-invasive Brain Recordings
item.description: Cross-attention fusion of static and dynamic language representations improves semantic reconstruction from non-invasive brain signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Capacity of Thought: Benchmarking Llama 3.2 in Semantic fMRI Neural Language Decoding and Improving the Huth Encoding-Model Baseline
item.description: Control ablations reveal high-capacity language models' fMRI decoding success stems from model priors rather than neural input information.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CityBehavEx: A Scalable and Empirically Validated LLM-Assisted Urban Simulation Platform
item.description: CityBehavEx combines LLMs with human mobility models to simulate city-scale populations efficiently and validate against real-world mobility patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Token Reduction Is Not Cost Reduction
item.description: Analysis of 2,848 Claude Code runs shows token reduction doesn't reliably lower billing costs because prompt caching dominates expenses.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] We Hebben Een Serieus Translatie: Modeling Intercomprehension as Probabilistic Inference
item.description: Bayesian probabilistic model of intercomprehension compares favorably to large language models and aligns with human performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Entropy in Semantic Memory Navigation in Blind and Sighted Individuals: The Effect of Visual Experience
item.description: Visual experience shapes semantic memory organization differently in blind versus sighted individuals, influencing entropy patterns for abstract and concrete concepts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing Semantic Navigation in Humans and Large Language Models using Natural Language Processing
item.description: Researchers found humans navigate semantic space more variably and exploratorily than LLMs; temperature tuning cannot reproduce human search patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fine-Tuned Multi-Agent Framework for Detecting OCEAN in Life Narratives
item.description: Multi-agent LLM framework using perspective-varied sub-agents accurately detects OCEAN personality traits from narratives by reducing model biases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RCWT: Measuring Task-Budget Displacement from Coordination Content in LLM Calls
item.description: RCWT measures task-budget displacement in fixed-prompt LLMs where coordination content reduces tokens available for evidence, causing sharp degradation below few hundred residual tokens.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fin-Analyst at FinMMEval 2026 Task 3: A Live Hybrid Trading Agent with LLM Specialists and Rule-Based Signals
item.description: Fin-Analyst, an eight-specialist LLM hybrid agent, ranked first on Tesla in FinMMEval 2026 with a 13.51% return versus buy-and-hold baseline.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FinResearchBench II: A Deep Research Benchmark with Consensus-Derived Gold Rubrics for Distinguishing Financial Report Quality
item.description: FinResearchBench II benchmarks financial research agents with 2,600 rubrics automatically generated and validated through LLM judges achieving high agreement with humans.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Shared Subcircuit Lets LLMs Count Down Across Tasks
item.description: Researchers identify a shared countdown subcircuit in LLMs that tracks remaining tokens for tasks like writing fixed-length sentences.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LakeQuest: A Three-Domain Benchmark for Grounded Question Answering across Data Lakes
item.description: LakeQuest benchmark tests question-answering systems on heterogeneous data lakes across three domains, revealing retrieval quality doesn't guarantee correct cross-modal reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] QUBO-Optimized Evidence Selection for Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering with Unconventional Solvers
item.description: Researchers propose a QUBO-based approach for evidence selection in retrieval-augmented question answering that balances relevance, coverage, and redundancy without requiring LLM-based selectors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluating Health Misinformation in Low-Resource Languages: Integrating Small Language Models with a Culturally-Sensitive Responsible NLP Framework (Bangla as a Case Study)
item.description: Research evaluates small language models for detecting health misinformation in Bangla to improve AI tools for low-resource communities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Policy-Conditioned Constrained Decoding for Column-Level Access Control in Text-to-SQL
item.description: PCC-SQL uses policy-conditioned decoding to deterministically enforce column-level access control in Text-to-SQL, achieving zero leakage with up to 88.7% coverage.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Binary Detection: A Multi-Dimensional Taxonomy of Cancer Misinformation on Reddit
item.description: Researchers develop multi-dimensional taxonomy for Reddit cancer misinformation, finding approximately 6% of discussions contain false treatment and screening claims.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning
item.description: Researchers scale zero RL to 1 trillion parameters, finding emergent reasoning behaviors including self-verification and parallel reasoning without hand-crafted heuristics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OmniPMNet: Bridging discrete and gridded PM10 forecasts via omni-query neural processes
item.description: OmniPMNet combines station-based and gridded PM10 forecasts via neural processes, achieving better accuracy than either approach alone.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Semidirect Fourier Delta Attention: Phase-Controlled Delta Memory with Constructive Chunk-WY Kernels
item.description: Semidirect Fourier Delta Attention improves linear attention mechanisms using phase-controlled Fourier control and chunk-WY factorization for better long-context memory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Repairing Shape-Prior Shortcuts in Long-Range Single-Shot Fringe Projection Profilometry
item.description: PhiCalNet addresses shape-prior shortcuts in single-shot fringe projection depth networks through phase-based architecture, reducing error 3.3x.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Qubit-Efficient Quantum Search for Hyperdimensional Decomposition via Logarithmic Encoding
item.description: Researchers propose a quantum framework for hyperdimensional computing that reduces qubit requirements from O(D) to O(log D) using logarithmic encoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mirror Horizon: Viable Path Entropy as a Measure of Bounded Reflection
item.description: Viable Path Entropy quantifies language models' capacity to sustain coherent continuations through bounded reflection, correlating with improved reasoning performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mathematics of Data Science
item.description: Comprehensive book on mathematical fundamentals of data science covering linear algebra, optimization, dimension reduction, and deep learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CARE-LoRA: Compressed Activation REconstruction for Memory-Efficient LoRA
item.description: CARE-LoRA reduces memory usage in LoRA fine-tuning by compressing activations and reconstructing gradients during backpropagation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How Query Visibility Changes KV-Cache Compression Rankings: A Matched-Budget Audit
item.description: KV-cache compression methods dramatically underperform in query-agnostic settings used in production deployments compared to standard query-aware evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BattVAE-GP: Generative Modeling of Long-Horizon Battery Degradation with Uncertainty Quantification
item.description: Hybrid VAE-Gaussian Process model predicts lithium-ion battery degradation at unseen charging rates with posterior uncertainty estimates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generalized Distribution-Free Semi-Supervised Learning with Risk Rewrite
item.description: Researchers propose a generalized distribution-free semi-supervised learning framework extending beyond binary classification with reduced variance and two new practical methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scale-Aware Attention for Scarce Neural Data: An RG-Flow Transformer on Sleep-EDF EEG
item.description: RG-Flow Transformer with scale-aware attention shows no statistically significant advantage over vanilla transformer on Sleep-EDF EEG staging tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scalable Optimal Transport Algorithm for Network Alignment
item.description: FastAlign, a sparsity-aware optimal transport framework, accelerates network alignment by 2.24x-32.54x while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Does Reward Teach State? A Hidden-Automaton Instrument and the Group-Language Boundary
item.description: Hidden automata experiments show RL agents partially learn latent task state rather than reward shortcuts, with task structure predicting representation learning success.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph-Constrained Policy Learning for Extreme Clinical Code Prediction
item.description: Graph-constrained policy formulation for clinical code prediction outperforms flat classification on rare codes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Exact and Certified Data Shapley for Weighted k-Nearest-Neighbor Regression and Soft-Label Prediction
item.description: New polynomial-time algorithms enable exact and certified Data Shapley computation for weighted k-nearest-neighbor regression, solving a previously intractable problem.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Constructed Reality, Contested Priors: Decoupling and the Architecture of Cognitive Relapse Under the Free Energy Principle
item.description: Researchers demonstrate that predictive systems can maintain high representational accuracy while dramatically shifting default behavior through domain mixing, revealing a decoupling between learning and acceptance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evaluating Reliability in Machine Learning Models for Early Chronic Kidney Disease Prediction: A Systematic Review of Data Leakage and Predictor Stability
item.description: Systematic review reveals data leakage artificially inflates CKD prediction accuracy by 15.28%; over 80% of predictors lack reproducibility.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LIDAR-AD: A Decoder-Free Latent-Interaction Dreamer with Action-Residual Chains for Autonomous Driving
item.description: LIDAR-AD introduces a decoder-free latent-interaction model for autonomous driving that models control as residual action updates for improved dynamics prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Coordinate Gauge: An Audited Protocol for Detecting Donor-Specific Functional Fingerprints after Neural Collapse
item.description: Research shows donor-specific neural network functional fingerprints remain distinguishable after neural collapse convergence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Self-Evolving In-Context Learning for Direct Pilot-to-Beamformer Design in MU-MISO Systems
item.description: In-context learning framework enables adaptive beamforming in MU-MISO wireless systems without retraining across different channel models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Discretize: Diffusion-Based Adaptive Mesh with Spectral Guidance
item.description: Diffusion models enable neural PDE surrogates to learn adaptive mesh discretization based on system dynamics, improving resolution allocation versus fixed grids.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Signal-Guided Optimization for Machine Unlearning
item.description: GSUO framework uses fine-grained guidance signals to optimize machine unlearning, preventing over-forgetting that harms utility and under-forgetting security risks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LiteTopK: Exploiting the Curse of Dimensionality for a Fused Indexer-TopK Kernel in Long-Context Sparse Attention
item.description: LiteTopK is a GPU kernel that optimizes top-k selection in sparse attention by exploiting high-dimensional distance concentration, achieving 1.2x speedup in LLM prefill.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gene Expression-Informed Jointly Controlled Generative Modeling for Precision Molecular Design
item.description: JoPMol jointly integrates gene expression profiles, molecular structures, and chemical properties to generate personalized drug candidates with superior performance.
